twitter_thread: 63% of budgeting app users overspend by $1,300/month. What's driving this trend?
AI-powered bill automation with You Need a Budget can save $143/month. Try it with 3 bills.
Mint's investment tracking lacks real-time data, while Personal Capital charges 0.49%-0.89% fees. Consider Schwab's dedicated app.
Top 2026 budgeting apps prioritize simplicity: 75% of users quit due to feature overload.
Irregular expenses like car repairs and medical bills account for 15% of income. Set aside $500/month.
Gadgets alone won't fix financial mismanagement. Review your budget every 2 weeks.
What budgeting tactic has saved you the most money in 2026? #personalfinance #budgeting
pack.linkedin: The 63% of budgeting app users who overspend by $1,300/month in 2026 are losing $15,600/year. AI-driven automation with tools like You Need a Budget can save $1,716/year. However, choosing the right tools is crucial, as fees like Personal Capital's 0.49%-0.89% can add up. What strategies have you found effective in maintaining a balanced budget, and how can technology better support financial management?
